site.title: Awards & Trophies | ION Print & Promo
site.description: Custom awards, plaques, engraved gifts, and framed recognition items for businesses, teams, schools, and events.

hero.title: Awards & Trophies
hero.imageAlt: Custom awards, trophies, and engraved recognition items

centreText.title: Recognition That Matters
centreText.description: From sports trophies and corporate awards to plaques, framed prints, and engraved gifts, we help organizations recognize the people and moments that matter most.

features.title: Awards, Plaques & Trophies
features.description:
Give credit where it's due and reward those who show up and get the job done. Custom engraved awards and trophies celebrate achievement, honour milestones, and offer lasting recognition.

  • Corporate awards & recognition
  • Acrylic, crystal & glass awards
  • Team awards & tournament trophies
  • Retirement & milestone recognition
  • Engraved gifts, drinkware & keepsakes

Available in classic, trending, or custom styles, we'll help you choose the right piece for your team, event, or special occasion.

features.title: Big Bold Event Gear
features.description:
For sports tournaments, school or corporate events, fundraisers, camps, weddings, or church celebrations, customizable products help create a memorable experience.

  • Balls, towels & umbrellas
  • Water bottles, hats, t-shirts & hoodies
  • Cooler bags & fun outdoor items
  • Party & welcome bags
  • Handy home & office essentials

Show your community you care with carefully curated items that are sure to be enjoyed.

features.title: Fresh Ideas. Strong Branding
features.description:
We help our clients choose products that are current, useful, and perfectly suited to your audience and event. Don't waste your time or money on outdated giveaway items that get ignored.

Talk to us about unique or trending items such as:

  • Drinkware & insulated mugs
  • Phone accessories & chargers
  • Wellness & lifestyle items
  • Eco-friendly & reusable products
  • Upscale & exclusive gift items
  • Made in Canada swag

We'll help you stay on budget, on trend, and aligned with your event goals.
